item.name: Whisper-go Key
item.description: It may simply be their imagination, but some say they can hear the sound of a thousand groans as the key turns the gears.

mount.name: Whisper-go
mount.action: Summon forth the Whisper-go. A small, flying vessel designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Whisper.
mount.description: Taken in by the vibrant sights of the Gold Saucer, the wandering executive sought out the plaza's architect to design him a vessel of transportation similar in flamboyance to its myriad attractions. The seats are so finely upholstered riders swear it is as if they are floating on air.
mount.tooltip:
So this is how
man flies without
wings? But it is
so strange-looking!
- Dragonet

obj.n: You Must Needs Befriend Them All I
